name: claude-autopilot
description: Quality and validation tooling for the claude-autopilot marketplace. The deliverable is prompt content (skills, commands, templates); these scripts keep the manifests valid and the docs lint-clean.

scripts.check: pnpm run validate && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint
scripts.check:all: pnpm run check && pnpm run link-check:offline
scripts.fix: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix
